title: AdBook integration

posts.author: MariaRH (Maria de Bofarull)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Our company uses AdBook for accounting and our Client Operations team need to do a lot of manual work in uploading/updating boards every week/month so other teams have access to information that only AdBook has.
We (I) mentioned this a couple of years ago but have been advised to add it in the community and hopefully it’s a feature that can be developed soon.
Thanks!
